title: Battle of Halanit

After the rogue [[Starfighter/Legends|starfighter]] unit [[Rogue Squadron/Legends|Rogue Squadron]] conducted a number of raids against [[Xucphra Corporation]] [[Bacta/Legends|bacta]] convoys, [[Ysanne Isard]] retaliated by '''destroying''' a colony on the [[Planet/Legends|planet]] [[Halanit]].

==Background==
The target, on the [[Planet/Legends|planet]] [[Halanit]], was a small colony which had received some of the [[Bacta/Legends|bacta]] seized by [[Rogue Squadron/Legends|Rogue Squadron]] from the [[Xucphra Corporation]]'s [[Bacta/Legends|bacta]] convoys. The initial attack against the colony was conducted by [[TIE series/Legends|TIE]] [[Starfighter/Legends|starfighters]] flown by [[Thyferran Home Defense Corps]] [[Pilot/Legends|pilots]], chosen by Xucphra [[Chief Operating Officer]] [[Ysanne Isard]] to increase the native Thyferrans' involvement in the [[Bacta War|ongoing campaign]] against the Rogues.<ref name="Bacta War" />

==The battle==
Launching from the [[Victory II-class Star Destroyer/Legends|''Victory II''-class Star Destroyer]] [[Corrupter/Legends|''Corrupter'']], [[Commander/Legends|Commander]] [[Erisi Dlarit]] guided a group of four [[TIE/IN interceptor/Legends|TIE interceptors]] and four [[TIE/sa tactical bomber/Legends|TIE bombers]] belonging to the [[Thyferran Home Defense Corps]]. The TIE bombers dropped [[Thermal detonator/Legends|thermal detonators]] to melt the ice covering the double-paneled [[Transparisteel/Legends|transparisteel]] dome protecting the colony. The uncovered dome was then destroyed with the use of high-yield [[Proton bomb/Legends|proton bombs]]. With the dome destroyed, the TIE Interceptors began to strafe the civilians while two [[Lambda-class T-4a shuttle/Legends|''Lambda''-class shuttles]] landed and began to unload their [[Stormtrooper/Legends|stormtroopers]].<ref name="Bacta War" />

The colony in itself had no weapons of any sort, but [[Gavin Darklighter]], who was refueling [[Gavin Darklighter's T-65 X-wing|his starfighter]] there after having escaped with a blind-jump from the ''Corrupter'' during a [[Ambush of the bacta tankers|bacta tanker hijacking]], tried to protect the colonists. The Rogue Squadron pilot managed to shoot down three Interceptors, before he was forced to jump away. After the short battle, the ''Corrupter'' initiated a planetary barrage that expanded the damage done by the TIE Bombers and stormtroopers.<ref name="Bacta War" />

==Aftermath==
The [[New Republic/Legends|New Republic]] sent ships for rescue purposes, but it was believed that none of the colonists survived the attack.<ref name="Bacta War" />

The retaliatory strike at Halanit forced Rogue Squadron to alter their tactics to avoid further harm to innocent worlds, put into practice in the subsequent [[Battle of Qretu 5|attack]] on the [[Q5A7 Bacta Refinement Plant]] on [[Qretu 5]].<ref name="Bacta War" />

==Appearances==
